content.speakerText: We gotta celebrate this! Dinner on me this Friday?
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们得庆祝一下！这周五我请客吃饭？

options.text: Absolutely! I’ve been dying to treat you anyway.
I’m not sure I can make it—I’m busy.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的热情提议，并用 'I’ve been dying to treat you' 表达了同样想请客的意愿，符合自然口语和社交礼仪。选项1错误地反转了请客方；选项3是拒绝，不符合积极庆祝的语境；选项4质疑庆祝理由，显得不礼貌且不合时宜。

content.speakerText: I’m so grateful—this means a lot to me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激，这对我意义重大。

options.text: You deserve every bit of it. Let’s make it a night to remember!

content.explanation: 正确答案通过 'You deserve every bit of it' 肯定对方成就，并用 'make it a night to remember' 提升情感氛围，是高情商回应。选项1虽正确但过于平淡；选项3贬低自己，不合语境；选项4拒绝庆祝，完全违背场景意图。

content.speakerText: I just got promoted! Let’s do something special this weekend.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚升职了！这个周末我们做点特别的吧。

options.text: That’s great, but I’m on a budget this month.
Wow, congrats! How about a fancy dinner? My treat!
I heard you’re changing jobs. Is that true?
I don’t like going out on weekends.

content.explanation: 正确答案热情回应成就，用 'fancy dinner' 和 'My treat!' 符合提议庆祝的语境，体现自然口语和慷慨态度。选项1虽真实但扫兴；选项3转移话题，不相关；选项4直接拒绝，缺乏社交礼仪。
